content:
QBR SUMMARY
Customer: Harmon Retail Group
Customer ID: C005
Contract ID: K005
Account Executive: James Okafor
Period: H2 2023 (July – December 2023)
Meeting Date: January 15, 2024
Attendees: James Okafor (AE), Sandra Harmon (COO), Darius Moore (Regional Manager West)

BUSINESS PERFORMANCE
Harmon Retail opened 3 additional store locations in H2 as planned, bringing total to 25 stores. Holiday season performance was strong — Sandra Harmon reported their best Q4 in five years, driven partly by improved operational consistency across locations.

PLATFORM USAGE
DataSync Pro went live November 1, 2023. In the first two months, 48 of 50 licensed users activated their accounts. Weekly active users averaged 44 in November and 47 in December. Document creation activity was highest in the West region, led by Darius Moore's district.

KEY DISCUSSION POINTS
- Mobile app adoption has been strong — approximately 70% of document activity is happening on mobile
- The Fresno store's compliance visit success story was highlighted as a proof point for the platform's value
- Simultaneous edit conflicts on mobile were flagged as a recurring friction point — James Okafor committed to escalating to the product team
- Sandra Harmon raised the distribution center expansion — estimated 18 additional users, targeting November 2024 renewal as the moment to add them

SATISFACTION RATING: 4.5/5
Sandra Harmon: "The mobile app has changed how our managers work. The compliance visit result was exactly the kind of outcome we were hoping for."

ACTION ITEMS
- James Okafor to escalate simultaneous mobile edit issue to product team by January 22
- Expansion proposal for distribution center to be prepared ahead of November 2024 renewal
- Schedule mid-year check-in for July 2024

NEXT QBR: July 2024
